title: How do AT Shields work
wikitext:
[]: How do AT Shields work? Post by Margerald » Sat Sep 29, 2012 1:24 am What is the science behind AT Shields? How are they created and how do they function? I understand this question is largely based on speculation, but if that's all you can supply, please post your thoughts.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 29, 2012 2:04 am They're the barriers that separate souls from other souls. Given that souls have an objective quantum existence in the Evaverse, the science behind AT Fields is probably similar quantum magic.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 29, 2012 7:30 am FIELDS

[]: Ah EM, I can tell you're hurtin'. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Sep 29, 2012 8:08 am ^Not just that, it's some kind of wall of: SPOILER: Show
